name: simplycubed
description: SimplyCubed certified Agent Skills — scanned and verified. https://simplycubed.com/skills

plugins.name: ci-cd-automation
plugins.description: Automates CI/CD pipeline setup. Use when setting up or modifying build and deployment pipelines, automating quality gates, configuring test runners in CI, or establishing deployment strategies.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Conducts multi-axis code review before merging any change. Use when reviewing code written by yourself, another agent, or a human, to assess quality across multiple dimensions before it enters the main branch.

plugins.name: docs-adrs
plugins.description: Records decisions and documentation. Use when making architectural decisions, changing public APIs, shipping features, or recording context that future engineers and agents need to understand the codebase.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Removes signs of AI-generated writing so text reads naturally — detects and fixes inflated symbolism, promotional language, vague attributions, rule-of-three, and other tells from Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide. Use when editing or reviewing text.

plugins.name: linus-level
plugins.description: A 1.0–10.0 "engineering working-mode" dial for coding agents — tunes agency, assumption budget, verification, and security posture from fast prototyping to maintainer-grade rigor. Triggers on "Linus Level", "LL n", or set-rigor / maintainer-mode requests.

plugins.name: nothing-design
plugins.description: Applies the Nothing design system to UI work. Use when the user explicitly asks for "Nothing style", "Nothing design", or to apply the Nothing design system — never automatically for generic UI tasks.

plugins.name: observability
plugins.description: Instruments code so production behavior is visible and diagnosable — logging, metrics, tracing, alerting. Use when shipping features that run in production or when you cannot tell what happened from available data.

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Browser automation with Playwright: auto-detects dev servers, writes test scripts, fills forms, takes screenshots, checks responsive design, validates UX, and tests login flows and links. Use to test websites or automate browser interactions.

plugins.name: security-hardening
plugins.description: Hardens code against vulnerabilities. Use when handling user input, authentication, data storage, or external integrations, or building any feature that accepts untrusted data, manages sessions, or calls third-party services.
